DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY RALPH BOWEN--REGINONAL MGR. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFFS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOSSIER, ROBERT WILLIAM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY AT THE REQUEST OF CHERRIE WILLINGHAM, SHE IS REMOVED FROM THIS CLAIM AS A PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
